title: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: Pay [red]50[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Obtain the Bone Tea relic.

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: Pay [red]150[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Obtain the Ember Tea relic.

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: Obtain the Tea of Discourtesy relic for free.

conditions: All players need at least 150 Gold
notes: This is a shop-style event offering three tea relics with different costs. The Bone Tea and Ember Tea options are only available if you have sufficient Gold; the Tea of Discourtesy is always available regardless. After selecting a tea, the event displays a special sequence describing the tea master's ceremonial preparation.
